---
title: "Slides: Dynamic reporting"
subtitle: A workshop by the Center for Reproducible Science
#date:  "November 07, 2024"
image:  Infographic_dynamic_reporting.jpg
image-height: 10px
 # title-slide-style: pandoc
author:
  - name: Fabio Molo
   # affiliation: Center for Reproducible Science
  - name: Gorka Fraga Gonzalez
  #  affiliation: Center for Reproducible Science
editor: visual
preview-links: true
format: 
  revealjs:
    menu: false
    theme: custom-theme.scss
    embed-resources: true
    progress: true
    slide-number: true
    footer:   University of Zurich | Department of XYZ              <a href="https://crsuzh.pages.uzh.ch/Workshop_Quarto_2024_UNIGE" target="_blank"> ⏎ home </a>
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: narrow_alps.png
      data-background-size: contain
      data-background-position: bottom
      data-background-opacity: "0.8"
---

Coming soon
